title: Briny Springy Egyptian Cherry Tagine
description: A show-off Egyptian dish featuring cherries, a tangy fermented kimchi, and a hint of spring freshness. Perfect for a special occasion or when you want to impress your guests.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and saut7 them for 1 minute.
Add the green olives, cumin, cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and black pepper. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the fermented kimchi and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fresh cherries and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to release their juice.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the tagine rest for 10-15 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Reheat the tagine gently before serving, if needed.
